user_query:
I need your help drafting a MOVA agent contract for a vendor risk assessment assistant. Please read input/requirements.md and input/connectors.json first. Then run your 8-phase guided interview: propose defaults at each phase, ask me one focused question at a time, and flag any risks you see (this agent will handle PII and GDPR constraints). When we reach the final review, assemble the full schema-valid ds.mova_agent_contract_core_v1 JSON and save it to output/agent.risk.vendor_assessor.contract.v1.2.0.json.

Fixed requirements you must honor in the final JSON:
- Identity
  - agent_id: agent.risk.vendor_assessor
  - agent_version: 1.2.0
  - status: draft
  - owner.owner_id: risk-ops-team
  - owner.owner_kind: organization
  - meta.title: Vendor Risk Assessor
  - meta.lang: en
  - meta.tags must include: risk, vendor, compliance (you may add more)
  - meta.description should clearly state scope and include the words: "escalation", "PII", and "GDPR"
- Task domains and capabilities
  - task_domains must include: risk and compliance (you may add security if appropriate)
  - capability_tags must include at least: analyze, classify, validate, escalate (you may add others like generate_text or recommend)
- Envelopes
  - input_envelope_ids must include exactly these two: env.risk.assessment_request_v1 and env.risk.vendor_profile_v1
  - output_envelope_ids must include exactly these two: env.risk.assessment_report_v1 and env.risk.escalation_request_v1
- Runtime and connectors
  - runtime_binding_ref: runtime.cloud.generic_v1
  - Include all connectors found in input/connectors.json (at minimum expect: connector.vendor_db.supplier_v1, connector.ticket.jira_v1, connector.security.policymap_v1)
- Policy
  - policy_profile_ref: policy.risk.vendor_assessment_guardrails_v1
- Observability
  - observability_profile.compact_required: true
  - observability_profile.semantic_required: true
  - observability_profile.otel_correlation_required: true
  - observability_profile.required_artifacts must include at least: episode, decision_log, audit_trail
- Determinism & limits
  - determinism_controls.seed_required: true
  - determinism_controls.replay_supported: true
  - limits must be present with: max_tokens between 3000 and 8000 inclusive; max_duration_ms between 90000 and 180000 inclusive; max_tool_calls >= 5

Process notes:
- Use envelope naming conventions (env.risk.*_v1) and explain them when you propose.
- Propose connectors based on input/connectors.json and explain why each is needed.
- If I don’t answer a question within your flow, proceed with smart defaults and the fixed requirements above.
- At the end, save the final contract JSON to output/agent.risk.vendor_assessor.contract.v1.2.0.json (do not use any other path or filename).
